response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer with 18+ years of progression to senior levels, currently working at the hiring company on TypeScript/Node.js and AI agent infrastructure (MCP). Core technical abilities, architectural thinking, and problem-solving skills are well-demonstrated. Primary concerns are recent React work (not clearly evidenced) and specific testing framework experience (Jest/Vitest), both of which warrant discussion but don't preclude candidacy given the strong baseline.
strengths: 18+ years of full-stack development with demonstrated progression to senior/staff roles, showing sustained ability to design and deliver complex systems across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded platforms

Current role provides direct alignment: working at hiring company (re:cinq) on primary stack (TypeScript/Node.js) and emerging focus (AI agent infrastructure with MCP), demonstrating cutting-edge capability
Strong architectural expertise: optimized low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/second, AWS CDK, Docker/Kubernetes, established TDD and CI/CD practices throughout career
concerns: React expertise not clearly demonstrated in recent 14 months at re:cinq; last explicit mention was at Optilyz (ended Feb 2025) as secondary to backend work, leaving primary stack alignment uncertain
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned despite being core requirements; strong TDD advocacy is evident but framework-specific expertise unverified
Security and authentication best-practices not explicitly documented in resume, though likely gained through senior enterprise roles; depth worth confirming in interview

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent infrastructure role at hiring company
18+ years TypeScript/Node.js mastery at senior levels
Recent React and testing framework depth unclear
